top_items.title: AI Is Not Improving Productivity: Nobel Laureate Daron Acemoglu
top_items.one_liner: Acemoglu challenges AI productivity hype — critical counterpoint for any executive pitching or stress-testing AI business cases.

top_items.title: AI Coding Tools for Knowledge Work: What Executives Need to Know
top_items.one_liner: MIT SMR makes the executive case for agentic coding tools like Claude Code beyond developers — perfect briefing material.

top_items.title: Anthropic launches a multi-agent code review tool for Claude Code
top_items.one_liner: Anthropic's new multi-agent code review in Claude Code addresses quality at scale as AI-generated code volumes surge.
